classification_profile.one_line_description: NotebookLM itself does not expose the cleanest standalone toolkit surface; access likely runs through broader Google/Gemini enterprise APIs instead.
classification_profile.main_blocker: There is no obvious standalone public NotebookLM developer surface comparable to a first-class app API, so access likely depends on broader Google enterprise surfaces.
classification_profile.notes: Classification is based on public docs availability plus whether the product exposes a direct API, CLI, or MCP surface.
